mapper.select: /* 특가상품 상세 정보 조회 */ SELECT M.PROGRESS_TYPE , M.SPECIAL_ID , M.SPECIAL_NM , D.SPECIAL_DTL_ID , D.PRODUCT_ID , D.QTY , IFNULL(D.REMAIN_QTY , D.QTY) REMAIN_QTY , IFNULL(D.LIMIT_QTY , 5) LIMIT_QTY , D.ORG_SALES_PRICE , D.SALES_PRICE , D.SALES_RATE , D.DESCRIPTION , D.PICKUP_TAG , D.TAG_OVERRIDE , DATE_FORMAT(D.EXPIRATION_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') EXPIRATION_DATE /* 관리자가 고정한 노출 소비기한 (NULL이면 자동) */ , P.PRODUCT_NM , C.CATEGORY_NM , SP.PARTNER_NM , M.PROGRESS_TYPE/* 현재 특가 단계 (준비 ,진행중 ) */ , DATE_FORMAT(M.START_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') START_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(M.END_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') END_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(M.PICKUP_END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') PICKUP_END_DATE , (SELECT MAX(NAME) NAME FROM user_mst WHERE USER_ID = (CASE WHEN M.UPDATE_USER IS NOT NULL THEN M.UPDATE_USER ELSE M.CREATE_USER END) ) UPDATE_USER , CASE WHEN M.UPDATE_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN DATE_FORMAT(M.UPDATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(M.CREATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') END UPDATE_DATE FROM special_dtl D LEFT JOIN special_mst M ON D.SPECIAL_ID = M.SPECIAL_ID LEFT JOIN product_mst P ON D.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN category_mst C ON P.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN store_partner_mst SP ON P.PARTNER_ID = SP.PARTNER_ID WHERE M.SPECIAL_ID = #{specialId} ORDER BY D.SPECIAL_DTL_ID ASC

WITH ACT AS ( SELECT PD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID, PD.PRODUCT_ID, PD.LOCATION_ID, PD.ORG_STOCK_QTY AS ORG, COALESCE(PD.EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE'9999-12-31') AS EXP_KEY, PD.RECEIVED_DATE AS RCV, PD.EXPIRATION_DATE AS EXP_DATE FROM product_dtl PD WHERE PD.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND PD.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} AND (PD.EXPIRATION_DATE IS NULL OR PD.EXPIRATION_DATE >= CURDATE()) ), SQ AS ( SELECT SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID, SUM(SD.QTY) AS Q FROM sales_dtl SD JOIN sales_mst SM ON SM.SALES_ID = SD.SALES_ID WHERE SD.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND SM.SALES_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' GROUP BY SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID ), DQ AS ( SELECT DD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID, SUM(DD.QTY) AS Q FROM disposal_dtl DD WHERE DD.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} GROUP BY DD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID ), SP AS ( SELECT SM.LOCATION_ID, SUM(IFNULL(SPD.REMAIN_QTY, SPD.QTY)) + IFNULL(SUM(SR.RESERVATION_CNT),0) AS Q FROM special_dtl SPD JOIN special_mst SM ON SPD.SPECIAL_ID = SM.SPECIAL_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SRD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID, SUM(SRD.RESERVATION_CNT) AS RESERVATION_CNT FROM special_rsv_mst SRM JOIN special_rsv_dtl SRD ON SRM.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID = SRD.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID WHERE SRM.SALES_ID IS NULL AND SRM.RESERVATION_STATUS = 'RESERVATION' GROUP BY SRD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID ) SR ON SPD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID = SR.SPECIAL_DTL_ID WHERE SM.PROGRESS_TYPE IN ('START','READY') AND SPD.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} GROUP BY SM.LOCATION_ID ), GB AS ( SELECT G.LOCATION_ID, SUM(J.TOTAL_QTY) AS Q FROM groupbuy_join_mst J JOIN groupbuy_mst G ON G.GROUPBUY_ID = J.GROUPBUY_ID WHERE J.JOIN_STATUS = 'JOIN' AND G.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} GROUP BY G.LOCATION_ID ), BASE AS ( SELECT A.*, IFNULL(SQ.Q,0) AS SOLD, IFNULL(DQ.Q,0) AS DISP FROM ACT A LEFT JOIN SQ ON SQ.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = A.PRODUCT_DTL_ID LEFT JOIN DQ ON DQ.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = A.PRODUCT_DTL_ID ), DED AS ( SELECT B.LOCATION_ID, SUM(B.SOLD) + SUM(B.DISP) + MAX(IFNULL(SP.Q,0)) + MAX(IFNULL(GB.Q,0)) AS TOTAL_DED FROM BASE B LEFT JOIN SP ON SP.LOCATION_ID = B.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN GB ON GB.LOCATION_ID = B.LOCATION_ID GROUP BY B.LOCATION_ID ), FIFO AS ( SELECT B.PRODUCT_DTL_ID, B.LOCATION_ID, B.ORG, B.EXP_KEY, B.EXP_DATE, D.TOTAL_DED, COALESCE(SUM(B.ORG) OVER ( PARTITION BY B.LOCATION_ID ORDER BY B.EXP_KEY, B.RCV, B.PRODUCT_DTL_ID ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING), 0) AS CUM_BEFORE FROM BASE B JOIN DED D ON D.LOCATION_ID = B.LOCATION_ID ), CALC AS ( SELECT PRODUCT_DTL_ID, EXP_KEY, EXP_DATE, ORG - GREATEST(0, LEAST(ORG, TOTAL_DED - CUM_BEFORE)) AS CUR FROM FIFO ) /* EXPIRATION_DATE 는 datetime → 같은 '날짜'의 다른 시각 lot 을 하나로 묶어 노출 (임박순). 노출 소비기한은 '표시 전용' 선택지이므로 FIFO 가용분(CUR>=1)으로 거르지 않고 미만료 활성 lot 의 소비기한을 모두 후보로 제공한다(가장 임박한 날짜가 디폴트가 되도록). availableQty(SUM(CUR))는 참고용이며 프론트 표시에는 사용하지 않는다. */ SELECT DATE_FORMAT(EXP_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS expirationDate, SUM(CUR) AS availableQty FROM CALC GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(EXP_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY MIN(EXP_KEY) ASC

SELECT SRM.USER_ID AS USER_ID , UM.NAME AS NAME , UM.PHONE AS PHONE , COUNT(DISTINCT SRM.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID) AS ITEM_CNT , SUM(SRD.RESERVATION_CNT) AS TOTAL_QTY , SUM(SRD.RESERVATION_PRICE) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT , MIN(DATE_FORMAT(SM.START_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i')) AS PICKUP_START_DATE , MAX(DATE_FORMAT(SM.PICKUP_END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i')) AS PICKUP_END_DATE FROM special_rsv_mst SRM JOIN special_rsv_dtl SRD ON SRM.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID = SRD.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID AND SRD.CANCEL_YN = 'N' JOIN special_dtl SD ON SRD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID = SD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID JOIN special_mst SM ON SD.SPECIAL_ID = SM.SPECIAL_ID LEFT JOIN user_mst UM ON SRM.USER_ID = UM.USER_ID WHERE SM.STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND SM.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} AND SRM.RESERVATION_STATUS = 'RESERVATION'
AND SRD.RESERVATION_CNT > 0 /* DB가 UTC라 NOW() 대신 KST now(UTC_TIMESTAMP()+9h)로 픽업 가능기간 비교 */ AND (UTC_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 9 HOUR) >= SM.START_DATE AND (SM.PICKUP_END_DATE IS NULL OR (UTC_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 9 HOUR) <= SM.PICKUP_END_DATE)
GROUP BY SRM.USER_ID, UM.NAME, UM.PHONE ORDER BY TOTAL_AMOUNT DESC
